chapter_title.ar: باب أَقَلِّ مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ الزَّكَاةُ مِنَ الْحَرْثِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 7 – The least of what Obligates the Zakāt regarding it, from the farm

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/25)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/25)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الزَّكَاةِ فِي الزَّبِيبِ وَ التَّمْرِ فَقَالَ فِي كُلِّ خَمْسَةِ أَوْسَاقٍ وَسْقٌ وَ الْوَسْقُ سِتُّونَ صَاعاً وَ الزَّكَاةُ فِيهِمَا سَوَاءٌ فَأَمَّا الطَّعَامُ فَالْعُشُرُ فِيمَا سَقَتِ السَّمَاءُ وَ أَمَّا مَا سُقِيَ بِالْغَرْبِ وَ الدَّوَالِي فَإِنَّمَا عَلَيْهِ نِصْفُ الْعُشْرِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked about the Zakāt regarding the raisins and the dates, so heasws said: ‘With regards to every five Owsaaq, one Wasaq (20%), and the Wasaq is of sixty Sa’as (unit of weight), and the Zakāt regarding these two is the same. But, as for the food, so it is the tenth, in what is irrigated by the sky (rain), and as for what is irrigated by the (human) energy and the buckets, so rather, upon it would be half the tenth (5%)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about Zakat on raisins and dates. He (the Imam) said, ‘On every five awsaq (a certain measurement) there is one wasq. One wasq is sixty Sa‘. The amount of Zakat on both items is of the same amount. Of food items what is watered by rain from the sky Zakat is one out of ten, but if it is watered with use of energy and buckets Zakat on it is one of twenty.’”
